mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WEB_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION ( user_id, endpoint, p256dh, auth, active_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{endpoint}, #{p256dh}, #{auth}, #{activeYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE WEB_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION SET user_id = #{userId}, p256dh = #{p256dh}, auth = #{auth}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE endpoint = #{endpoint}
mapper.select: SELECT subscription_id, user_id, endpoint, p256dh, auth, active_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM WEB_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION WHERE endpoint = #{endpoint} LIMIT 1
SELECT subscription_id, user_id, endpoint, p256dh, auth, active_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM WEB_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND active_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
